title: rubus × lugiacus
intro: Rubus × lugiacus, also known as the thimbleberry hybrid or loganberry, is a plant species that is a cross between the blackberry and the raspberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus × lugiacus include its high content of antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × lugiacus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, aid in digestion, and provide relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus × lugiacus can be made into jams, jellies, and teas, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
